/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/PitchFold_Standalone.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_AAX_utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PitchFold_Standalone.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_ARA.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PitchFold_Standalone.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_Standalone.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PitchFold_Standalone.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_Unity.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PitchFold_Standalone.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_AAX.mm.o CMakeFiles/PitchFold_Standalone.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_AU_1.mm.o CMakeFiles/PitchFold_Standalone.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_AU_2.mm.o CMakeFiles/PitchFold_Standalone.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_AUv3.mm.o CMakeFiles/PitchFold_Standalone.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_LV2.mm.o CMakeFiles/PitchFold_Standalone.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_VST2.mm.o CMakeFiles/PitchFold_Standalone.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_VST3.mm.o -o PitchFold_artefacts/Release/Standalone/PitchFold.app/Contents/MacOS/PitchFold  PitchFold_artefacts/Release/libPitchFold_SharedCode.a libPitchFoldFonts.a libPitchFoldWebUI.a -framework WebKit -weak_framework Metal -weak_framework MetalKit -framework CoreAudioKit -framework DiscRecording -framework QuartzCore -framework CoreAudio -framework CoreMIDI -framework AudioToolbox -framework Accelerate -framework Cocoa -framework Foundation -framework IOKit -framework Security -flto -Wl,-weak_reference_mismatches,weak
